name: Blackstone Inc.
summary: Blackstone Inc. is a global alternative asset management firm. The company manages investment funds and vehicles across multiple segments including private equity, real estate, hedge fund solutions, and credit and insurance. Blackstone raises and invests capital on behalf of institutional and individual investors, generating management fees and performance-based revenues from its diversified alternative investment strategies.
